h3.visual_description: Bold, left-aligned, prefixed with multi-level decimal numbering (e.g., 3.2.6.).

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Caption label for charts or diagrams, typically contained within a shaded rectangular box.
Footnote entry located at the bottom of the page, corresponding to superscript numbers in the body text.
Page number located in the bottom center margin.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Superscript numeric indices (e.g., text^94) with corresponding bibliographic details in a footer section.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered page numbers at the bottom; multi-line footnote blocks at the bottom of the text area.
